channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla increases Actually Smart Summon speed by 33% in new FSD update
item.description: Tesla is rolling out FSD V14.3.3 today, and among the changes is a 33% speed increase to Actually Smart Summon — the feature now tops out at 8 mph, up from the 6 mph cap (less impressive when you put it like that). The speed bump is part of a broader update (software version 2026.14.6.6) that als...

item.title: Live intervention-free counter in FSD v14.3.3 raises potential safety concerns, Tesla improves Actually Smart Summon in this update
item.description: submitted by /u/CarCooler [link] [comments]

item.title: Why SpaceX Split Its Stock and 2 More Trillion-Dollar Issues
item.description: Three recent tidbits: SpaceX split its stock. Bloomberg reported Friday that SpaceX had split its stock five-to-one ahead of its massive IPO, which could raise $75 billion and value the company at up to $2 trillion. SpaceX didn’t respond to a request for comment about the split.

item.title: Tesla Just Raised Its EV Prices. Here’s Why.
item.description: Tesla often zigs when other companies zag. Tesla didn’t respond to a request for comment about the increases. Tesla hasn’t raised Model Y prices in the U.S.

item.title: This Supercharger Extension Cable Promises To Fix A Big Pain Point, But Falls Short: Expert
item.description: The production version of Hansshow’s second-generation extension cable promised to fix all of its predecessor’s problems.

item.title: Is a SpaceX-Tesla Merger Elon Musk's Endgame? Here Are 4 Factors Investors Need to Consider.
item.description: Here are four things to consider if Elon Musk decides to merge his space empire with Tesla.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Hubs Highlight Autonomy Potential As Australian Scrutiny Builds
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NasdaqGS:TSLA) has started building dedicated robotaxi maintenance hubs, preparing for large scale autonomous ride hailing operations. At the same time, Tesla is facing rising legal and regulatory scrutiny in Australia over alleged misleading claims about vehicle safety and self driv...

item.title: Elon Musk Says If We Don't Do Something About Corruption And Waste, 'The Ship Of America Is Going To Sink' —And We're All Going Down With It
item.description: America's debt bill has grown so large that even the world's richest man, Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk, sounded less like a tech mogul and more like someone warning the country its financial engine was starting to smoke. "A...

item.title: Elon Musk, Chip Giant?
item.description: Elon Musk’s empire may be expanding if recent plans to spend up to $119 billion in new chip fab facilities become reality. The team discusses the implications for the industry and Musk’s companies.

item.title: Peter Navarro Once Slammed Tesla Over China Reliance—Now Xi Jinping Says Beijing Will Open Wider To US Companies Amid Trump Visit
item.description: President Donald Trump‘s counselor and economist, Peter Navarro, had criticized Elon Musk-led Tesla Inc. last year, calling the company a “car assembler” reliant on overseas parts from China and other countries. Now, Chinese President Xi Jinping has said the country...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) raises Model Y prices by up to $1,000 — first increase in two years
item.description: Tesla has increased Model Y prices in the US by up to $1,000 across its Premium and Performance trims. It marks the first price increase on the Model Y in two years. The move ends a prolonged period of aggressive price cuts that defined Tesla’s strategy throughout 2024 and 2025, signaling a poten...

item.title: Tesla Raises U.S. Model Y Prices. Its Stock Just Forged A Lower Buy Point.
item.description: Tesla raised U.S. Model Y prices for the first time in two years. Tesla stock has forged a new, lower buy point.

item.title: Ford’s EV Pivot Was Disastrous. Now It’s Trying to Compete with Tesla on Energy Storage.
item.description: Ford, which failed to meet its ambitious EV targets, is now betting on the energy storage business. Can the company compete with Tesla there?

item.title: Tesla Model Y prices just went up for the first time in two years
item.description: Tesla just raised Model Y prices for the first time in two years, with the largest increase being $1,000. The move signals shifting dynamics in the competitive electric vehicle market as the company continues to work on balancing demand, profitability, and accessibility. The new pricing affects p...

item.title: Elon Musk explains why he cannot be fired from SpaceX
item.description: Elon Musk cannot be fired from SpaceX, and there’s a reason for that. In a blunt post on X on Friday, Elon Musk confirmed plans to structurally shield his leadership at SpaceX, ensuring he cannot be fired while tying a potential trillion-dollar compensation package to the company’s long-term goal...

item.title: Tesla discloses two Robotaxi crashes to NHTSA
item.description: Tesla has disclosed information on two low-speed crashes that occurred in Austin with its Robotaxi platform. These incidents occurred with teleoperators steering the vehicle, and there were no passengers in the car at the time they happened. Newly unredacted data filed with the National Highway T...

item.title: Model Y - Premium/Perf Price Increase 05.15.26 US
item.description: Looks like they just increased the "Premium" Line of the Model Y today by $1,000 each and $500 for the Performance AWD Premium RWD --> $44,990 to $45,990 Premium AWD --> $48,990 to $49,990 Performance AWD --> $57,490 to $57,990 submitted by /u/S-is-for-Superman [link] [comments]

item.title: SpaceX Holders Sign Off on 5-for-1 Stock Split Ahead of IPO
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- SpaceX notified investors that it is executing a 5-for-1 stock split, a move that will reduce the price investors will pay for each share offered in its impending initial public offering.Most Read from BloombergWinners and Losers From Trump and Xi’s Beijing Summit TalksHormuz Oil F...

item.title: Tesla China Financing Push Tests Growth, Margins And Rich Valuation
item.description: Tesla has introduced new, more affordable financing offers for its locally made vehicles in China. The move comes after April retail sales in China declined and the company dropped out of the country's top ten EV makers. The offers are targeted at improving affordability and shoring up Tesla's po...

item.title: Tesla Patents New Trim Clip to Reduce Rattles and Vibrations
item.description: submitted by /u/RedgeQc [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Full Self Driving (Supervised) Now Permitted in Belgium
item.description: Following Tesla Full Self Driving (Supervised) approval and deployment in the Netherlands, the driver-assist software is now permitted to use in Belgium, sort of. For now, one Tesla car is allowed to test the technology in Flanders, the northern region of Belgium. Of course, if all goes well, Ful...

item.title: Tesla Slashing Down Payments & Loan Terms in China Amidst Dropping Sales
item.description: Like in other countries, and like other companies in China, Tesla has seen its sales drop in the largest EV market in the world this year. Tesla’s sales were down 10% year over year there in April, and they were down 15% across the first 4 months of the year. ...

item.title: Podcast: Tesla Robotaxi, Rivian R2 configurator is live, China is taking over EU factories, and more
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss updates to Tesla Robotaxi, Rivian R2 configurator going live, China taking over EU factories, and more. Today’s episode is sponsored by GM Energy .

item.title: Elon Musk Sees $15 Trillion Optimus Upside — Tesla Investors Could Get A Piece For 'Free'
item.description: Tesla Inc is best known as an electric vehicle company, but that narrative is shifting with renewed focus on FSD, robotaxis and the Optimus humanoid robot. One analyst thinks buying Tesla stock today could get Optimus exposure for “free” based...

item.title: Heybike Ranger 3.0 Pro e-bike + $257 FREE bundle hits $1,399 low, Tesla Universal Wall Connector $550, Anker solar security cam, more
item.description: We are ending this week’s Green Deals with a jam-packed bang, led by the weekend flash sale on Heybike’s flagship Ranger 3.0 Pro Comfort Folding Fat Tire e-bike and a FREE $257 bundle of gear at the $1,399 low for the first time since Black Friday. Right behind that, we spotted Amazon dropping th...

item.title: Will Investors Still Love The Tesla Brand If It’s Not An Electric Vehicle Company?
item.description: Elon Musk departed the White House last year in disgrace, but all is forgotten and forgiven now that he’s part of the Trump Beijing entourage. Speaking on behalf of US business in China, the mercurial CEO is playing games on both sides of the aisle. He’s keenly aware how Trump ...

item.title: Cybercab Prototype Today in SF
item.description: submitted by /u/AcuteMtnSalsa [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Slips After China Trip Disappoints
item.description: Tesla investors wanted a breakthrough in China, but the Trump-Xi meeting ended without major trade agreements.

item.title: Rivian opens R2 configurator: here are all the options and pricing
item.description: Rivian has opened the online configurator for the R2, its critical mid-size electric SUV, giving reservation holders their first chance to spec out the vehicle ahead of deliveries. The Performance trim starts at $57,990 — just under Tesla’s Model Y Performance at $58,880. The configurator launch ...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Concerns Grow: Is TSLA Stock Still Worth Holding?
item.description: TSLA's robotaxi rollout faces delays, ride issues and rising Waymo competition as investors question whether Tesla can deliver on its AI ambitions.

item.title: SpaceX Could Become A $30 Trillion Monster, Ron Baron Says — And He Wants $1 Billion More
item.description: The highly anticipated SpaceX IPO could value the Elon Musk-led space company at $1.5 trillion or more. While that would make the newly public companies one of the most valuable in the world, investor Ron Baron thinks there's still plenty...

item.title: I Made $18,000 in ‘Free Money’ Selling Call Options on 200 Tesla Shares: Here’s How the Strategy Works
item.description: On a recent episode of the Rich Habits Podcast titled “169: Our Favorite Passive Income Strategy (2026),” co-host Austin Hankwitz called covered calls “one of the simplest options strategies in investing” and “the freest money that exists.” His receipt: “In 2024, 2025, I’ve made north of $18,000 ...

item.title: Car Wreck: Ford Falls 7%, Tesla Slides 4%
item.description: Shares of Ford (NYSE:F) are getting hit hard in mid-morning trading on Friday, down 7% intraday and changing hands around $13.50 after closing at $14.48 on Thursday. The drop essentially erases yesterday’s 7% auto-sector rally, and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) is sliding alongside it. Tesla is off 4% on t...

item.title: Tesla finally reveals what happened in 17 ‘Robotaxi’ crashes
item.description: Tesla has quietly unredacted all 17 of its autonomous driving crash narratives filed with NHTSA, revealing for the first time what actually happened in each incident. The automaker had been the only ADS operator to fully redact its crash reports, marking every single narrative as “confidential bu...

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck chosen by Kazakhstan’s elite security force: here’s why
item.description: Tesla Cybertruck was chosen by a Middle Eastern government agency because of its capability, safety, and other advantages that it offers over traditional pickups. In a striking display of futuristic security technology, Kazakhstan’s State Guard Service has integrated Tesla Cybertrucks as mobile c...

item.title: Tesla Stock Aims for 3 Weekly Gains. Trump’s China Trip Could Stop It.
item.description: Heading into Friday trading, Tesla stock has risen for two consecutive weeks and three of the past four.

item.title: SpaceX Has a Huge Week Ahead
item.description: FEATURE SpaceX has a busy handful of days ahead. For starters, Elon Musk’s rocket company is expected to give an update on its hotly anticipated IPO. The company’s S-1 initial public offering registration statement could become public as soon as next week, according to a CNBC report on Thursday.

item.title: Uber turns on Waymo as it pours $10B+ into owning robotaxi alternatives
item.description: Uber is publicly trashing its robotaxi partner Waymo while simultaneously investing more than $10 billion to build its own autonomous vehicle fleet with Rivian, Lucid, and Nuro. The ride-hailing giant’s executives have spent the last few months taking direct shots at Waymo’s technology and deploy...

item.title: Market Chatter: Twitter Investors' Stake in SpaceX Could Be Worth $100 Billion
item.description: Investors in Twitter, the social media platform now known as X, could own a stake in SpaceX worth ro

item.title: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of xETFs NVDA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: NYYY) and xETFs TSLA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: TYYY) with xETFs
item.description: Exchange Traded Concepts, LLC ("ETC") today announced, in conjunction with xETFs, the launch of the xETFs NVDA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: NYYY) and the xETFs TSLA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: TYYY), actively managed exchange-traded funds that seek to provide exposure to the price movements of NVDA and TS...

item.title: Tesla grabs massive Las Vegas warehouse for interesting Cybercab project
item.description: Tesla is beginning to construct what will be an incredibly unique project, as it is now building a 36,000-square-foot car wash just for the Cybercab in Clark County, Nevada, near Las Vegas. Tesla quietly filed plans to build the Cybercab car wash , and on May 12, the company submitted a permit to...

item.title: Market Chatter: Australian Judge Warns Tesla Over Document Production in Consumer Lawsuit
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) came under pressure from an Australian judge, who questioned whether the automaker was

item.title: Tesla to Invest $250 Million in Berlin Gigafactory
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is included among the 10 Best US Stocks to Invest in According to Billionaires. Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Elon Musk Says 'Space Is The Only Way' After Jensen Huang Warns AI Could Soon Need 1,000x More Energy
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk reaffirmed orbital datacenter goals on Thursday as NVIDIA Corp (NASDAQ:NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang outlined the growing need for energy to operate AI compute. Space Is The Only Way User @TheChiefNerd posted a clip on X that showed Huang sharing that th...

item.title: Tesla, Toyota expose surprising auto industry truth
item.description: Toyota Motor (TM) and Tesla (TSLA) are generally seen as rivals in the global auto business. Toyota is the manufacturing powerhouse, selling more than 11 million automobiles a year in almost every major market. Tesla is the electric vehicle disruptor that pushed the industry to embrace batteries,...

item.title: Tesla Stock Wobbles as China Self-Driving Talks Heat Up Again
item.description: Elon Musk's China Push Puts Tesla Self-Driving Dreams Back in Focus

item.title: Tesla China Talks Put FSD Prospects And Valuation Risks In Focus
item.description: Elon Musk joined President Trump’s delegation to China for high level talks with Chinese officials. During the visit, President Xi Jinping told Musk and other US CEOs that China plans to open its door wider to American companies. The trip raised investor focus on potential implications for Tesla’...

item.title: Tesla now forces drivers to give feedback when intervening on ‘Full Self-Driving’
item.description: Tesla has quietly made it mandatory for drivers to provide feedback every time they intervene on “Full Self-Driving.” The prompt, which used to disappear on its own after a few seconds, now stays on screen indefinitely until the driver selects a reason or sends a voice note. The change arrived wi...

item.title: Tesla robotaxi rollout features long wait times, safety concerns
item.description: STORY: Tesla's robotaxi service is experiencing significant operational problems in Texas, raising questions about CEO Elon Musk’s ambitious vision for a near future full of driverless cars. Reuters testing in Dallas, Houston and Austin found long wait times exceeding 30 minutes, limited availabi...

item.title: Tesla Solar Roof is on life support as it pivot to panels
item.description: Tesla’s Solar Roof was supposed to revolutionize residential solar. Elon Musk unveiled the product in 2016 with the promise of beautiful solar tiles that would replace your entire roof — and he set a target of 1,000 new Solar Roofs per week by the end of 2019. Nearly a decade later, Tesla has ins...
